## Describe the bug

A clear description of what is broken.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages from Chrome DevTools or CloudWatch logs.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Chrome version: [e.g. 122]
- MemoryMesh version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Affected tool: [Claude.ai / ChatGPT / Gemini / MCP Server / Importer]

## Additional context

Paste any relevant logs here.
